source_url: https://gitlab.com/gnuraco/pf2r
source_commit: ebd1a53a9ab072b12ef8d86c055cd23714334026
vendored_at: 2026-04-26
scope: expanded-bestiary (47 packs + pf2e.json UI strings)
notes: |
  Vendored 47 pack files + pf2e.json from upstream community module
  (https://gitlab.com/gnuraco/pf2r — "PF2eRUS" by Доктор#0353).

  Phase 109 expansion: added 28 AP-specific bestiary packs to enable
  RU translation for AP creatures (Outlaws of Alkenstar, Abomination
  Vaults, Kingmaker, etc.). Base packs unchanged byte-for-byte.

  Vendored packs (47):
    Mapping + UI:
      - mapping.json (Babele path config)
      - pf2e/pf2e.json (UI strings — PF2E.* namespace)

    Base bestiaries (existing):
      - pathfinder-monster-core.json, pathfinder-monster-core-2.json
      - pathfinder-bestiary.json, pathfinder-bestiary-2.json, pathfinder-bestiary-3.json
      - pathfinder-npc-core.json, npc-gallery.json
      - bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.json, bestiary-family-ability-glossary.json
      - bestiary-effects.json

    Spells + items + actions (existing):
      - spells-srd.json, spell-effects.json
      - actionspf2e.json, conditionitems.json
      - equipment-srd.json, equipment-effects.json
      - feats-srd.json, feat-effects.json

    AP + standalone bestiaries (Phase 109 added, 28):
      - abomination-vaults-bestiary.json
      - age-of-ashes-bestiary.json
      - agents-of-edgewatch-bestiary.json
      - battlecry-bestiary.json
      - blood-lords-bestiary.json
      - book-of-the-dead-bestiary.json
      - crown-of-the-kobold-king-bestiary.json
      - extinction-curse-bestiary.json
      - fall-of-plaguestone-bestiary.json
      - fists-of-the-ruby-phoenix-bestiary.json
      - gatewalkers-bestiary.json
      - hellbreakers-bestiary.json
      - howl-of-the-wild-bestiary.json
      - kingmaker-bestiary.json
      - lost-omens-bestiary.json
      - malevolence-bestiary.json
      - menace-under-otari-bestiary.json
      - outlaws-of-alkenstar-bestiary.json
      - quest-for-the-frozen-flame-bestiary.json
      - rage-of-elements-bestiary.json
      - revenge-of-the-runelords-bestiary.json
      - seven-dooms-for-sandpoint-bestiary.json
      - shades-of-blood-bestiary.json
      - shadows-at-sundown-bestiary.json
      - strength-of-thousands-bestiary.json
      - the-slithering-bestiary.json
      - troubles-in-otari-bestiary.json
      - war-of-immortals-bestiary.json

  Out of scope (still deferred): ancestries, classes, heritages,
  backgrounds, hazards, gmg-srd, adventure-specific-actions, vehicles,
  effects packs (campaign-effects, other-effects, etc.).

  Update procedure (manual):
    1. Pull latest pf2r source from upstream master.
    2. Re-copy 47 listed packs + pf2e.json (verbatim, byte-identical).
    3. Bump source_commit and vendored_at fields in VERSION.txt.
    4. Update LICENSES/OGL-SECTION-15.md if upstream COPYRIGHT chain changed.
    5. Update LICENSES/pf2-locale-ru-CONTRIBUTORS.md source_commit field to match.
